const.name: RsCantConvertAddr64
const.value: The address %%s%%.16x cannot be converted to 32 bit

const.name: RsEReplacementChar
const.value: Failed to get ANSI replacement character

const.value: load local variable onto the stack

const.value: pop value from stack to local variable

const.value: pop value from stack to local variable

const.value: store a value in an argument slot

const.name: RsCILCmdldlocs
const.value: load local variable onto the stack

const.name: RsCILCmdstlocs
const.value: pop value from stack to local variable

const.value: duplicate the top value of the stack

const.name: RsCILCmdpop
const.value: remove the top element of the stack

const.value: branch on false, null, or zero

const.value: branch on greater than or equal to

const.value: add integer values with overflow check

const.name: RsCILCmdaddovfun

const.name: RsCILCmdmulovf

const.name: RsCILCmdmulovfun

const.value: subtract integer values, checking for overflow

const.name: RsCILCmdsubovfun
const.value: subtract integer values, checking for overflow

const.value: end the finally or fault clause of an exception block

const.name: RsCILCmdleave
const.value: exit a protected region of code

const.name: RsCILCmdleaves
const.value: exit a protected region of code

const.value: compare greater than, unsigned or unordered

const.name: RsCILCmdcltun
const.value: compare less than, unsigned or unordered

const.name: RsCILCmdstarg
const.value: store a value in an argument slot

const.name: RsCILCmdldloc
const.value: load local variable onto the stack

const.name: RsCILCmdstloc
const.value: pop value from stack to local variable

const.name: RsCILCmdlocalloc
const.value: allocate space in the local dynamic memory pool

const.value: copy data from memory to memory

const.name: RsCILCmdinitblk
const.value: initialize a block of memory to a value

const.name: RsCILCmdsizeof
const.value: load the size in bytes of a value type

const.name: RsCILCmdrefanytype
const.value: load the type out of a typed reference

const.name: RsCILDescrbreak
const.value: inform a debugger that a breakpoint has been reached.

const.name: RsCILDescrstloc0
const.value: Pop value from stack into local variable 0.

const.value: Pop value from stack into local variable 2.

const.name: RsCILDescrstloc3
const.value: Pop value from stack into local variable 3.

const.name: RsCILDescrldargs
const.value: Load argument numbered num onto stack, short form.

const.name: RsCILDescrldargas
const.value: fetch the address of argument argNum, short form

const.name: RsCILDescrstargs
const.value: Store a value to the argument numbered num, short form

const.name: RsCILDescrldlocs
const.value: Load local variable of index indx onto stack, short form.

const.name: RsCILDescrldlocas
const.value: Load address of local variable with index indx, short form

const.name: RsCILDescrstlocs
const.value: Pop value from stack into local variable indx, short form.

const.name: RsCILDescrldnull
const.value: Push null reference on the stack

const.name: RsCILDescrldci4m1
const.value: Push -1 onto the stack as int32.

const.name: RsCILDescrldci40
const.value: Push 0 onto the stack as int32.

const.name: RsCILDescrldci41
const.value: Push 1 onto the stack as int32.

const.name: RsCILDescrldci42
const.value: Push 2 onto the stack as int32.

const.name: RsCILDescrldci43
const.value: Push 3 onto the stack as int32.

const.name: RsCILDescrldci44
const.value: Push 4 onto the stack as int32.

const.name: RsCILDescrldci45
const.value: Push 5 onto the stack as int32.

const.name: RsCILDescrldci46
const.value: Push 6 onto the stack as int32.

const.name: RsCILDescrldci47
const.value: Push 7 onto the stack as int32.

const.name: RsCILDescrldci48
const.value: Push 8 onto the stack as int32.

const.name: RsCILDescrldci4s
const.value: Push num onto the stack as int32, short form.

const.name: RsCILDescrldci4
const.value: Push num of type int32 onto the stack as int32.

const.name: RsCILDescrldci8
const.value: Push num of type int64 onto the stack as int64.

const.name: RsCILDescrldcr4
const.value: Push num of type float32 onto the stack as F.

const.name: RsCILDescrldcr8
const.value: Push num of type float64 onto the stack as F.

const.name: RsCILDescrdup
const.value: duplicate value on the top of the stack

const.name: RsCILDescrpop
const.value: pop a value from the stack

const.name: RsCILDescrjmp
const.value: Exit current method and jump to specified method

const.name: RsCILDescrcalli
const.value: Call method indicated on the stack with arguments described by callsitedescr.

const.name: RsCILDescrret
const.value: Return from method, possibly returning a value

const.name: RsCILDescrbrfalses
const.value: branch to target if value is zero (false), short form

const.name: RsCILDescrbrtrues
const.value: branch to target if value is non-zero (true), short form

const.name: RsCILDescrbeqs
const.value: branch to target if equal, short form

const.name: RsCILDescrbges
const.value: branch to target if greater than or equal to, short form

const.name: RsCILDescrbgts
const.value: branch to target if greater than, short form

const.name: RsCILDescrbles
const.value: branch to target if less than or equal to, short form

const.name: RsCILDescrblts
const.value: branch to target if less than

const.name: RsCILDescrbneuns
const.value: branch to target if unequal or unordered, short form

const.name: RsCILDescrbgeuns
const.value: branch to target if greater than or equal to (unsigned or unordered), short form

const.name: RsCILDescrbgtuns
const.value: branch to target if greater than (unsigned or unordered), short form

const.name: RsCILDescrbleuns
const.value: branch to target if less than or equal to (unsigned or unordered), short form

const.name: RsCILDescrbltuns
const.value: Branch to target if less than (unsigned or unordered), short form

const.name: RsCILDescrbrfalse
const.value: branch to target if value is zero (false)

const.name: RsCILDescrbrtrue
const.value: branch to target if value is non-zero (true)

const.name: RsCILDescrbge
const.value: branch to target if greater than or equal to

const.name: RsCILDescrbgt
const.value: branch to target if greater than

const.name: RsCILDescrble
const.value: branch to target if less than or equal to

const.name: RsCILDescrblt
const.value: branch to target if less than

const.name: RsCILDescrbneun
const.value: branch to target if unequal or unordered

const.name: RsCILDescrbgeun
const.value: branch to target if greater than or equal to (unsigned or unordered)

const.name: RsCILDescrbgtun
const.value: branch to target if greater than (unsigned or unordered)

const.name: RsCILDescrbleun
const.value: branch to target if less than or equal to (unsigned or unordered)

const.name: RsCILDescrbltun
const.value: Branch to target if less than (unsigned or unordered)

const.name: RsCILDescrswitch
const.value: jump to one of n values

const.name: RsCILDescrldindi1
const.value: Indirect load value of type int8 as int32 on the stack.

const.name: RsCILDescrldindu1
const.value: Indirect load value of type unsigned int8 as int32 on the stack.

const.name: RsCILDescrldindi2
const.value: Indirect load value of type int16 as int32 on the stack.

const.name: RsCILDescrldindu2
const.value: Indirect load value of type unsigned int16 as int32 on the stack.

const.name: RsCILDescrldindi4
const.value: Indirect load value of type int32 as int32 on the stack.

const.name: RsCILDescrldindu4
const.value: Indirect load value of type unsigned int32 as int32 on the stack.

const.name: RsCILDescrldindi8
const.value: Indirect load value of type int64 as int64 on the stack.

const.name: RsCILDescrldindi
const.value: Indirect load value of type native int as native int on the stack

const.name: RsCILDescrldindr4
const.value: Indirect load value of type float32 as F on the stack.

const.name: RsCILDescrldindr8
const.value: Indirect load value of type float64 as F on the stack.

const.name: RsCILDescrldindref
const.value: Indirect load value of type object ref as O on the stack.

const.name: RsCILDescrstindref
const.value: Store value of type object ref (type O) into memory at address

const.name: RsCILDescrstindi1
const.value: Store value of type int8 into memory at address

const.name: RsCILDescrstindi2
const.value: Store value of type int16 into memory at address

const.name: RsCILDescrstindi4
const.value: Store value of type int32 into memory at address

const.name: RsCILDescrstindi8
const.value: Store value of type int64 into memory at address

const.name: RsCILDescrstindr4
const.value: Store value of type float32 into memory at address

const.name: RsCILDescrstindr8
const.value: Store value of type float64 into memory at address

const.name: RsCILDescradd
const.value: Add two values, returning a new value

const.name: RsCILDescrsub
const.value: Subtract value2 from value1, returning a new value

const.name: RsCILDescrdiv
const.value: Divide two values to return a quotient or floating-point result

const.name: RsCILDescrdivun
const.value: Divide two values, unsigned, returning a quotient

const.name: RsCILDescrrem
const.value: Remainder of dividing value1 by value2

const.name: RsCILDescrremun
const.value: Remainder of unsigned dividing value1 by value2

const.name: RsCILDescrand
const.value: Bitwise AND of two integral values, returns an integral value

const.name: RsCILDescror
const.value: Bitwise OR of two integer values, returns an integer.

const.name: RsCILDescrxor
const.value: Bitwise XOR of integer values, returns an integer

const.name: RsCILDescrshl
const.value: Shift an integer to the left (shifting in zeros)

const.name: RsCILDescrshr
const.value: Shift an integer right, (shift in sign), return an integer

const.name: RsCILDescrshrun
const.value: Shift an integer right, (shift in zero), return an integer

const.name: RsCILDescrconvi1
const.value: Convert to int8, pushing int32 on stack

const.name: RsCILDescrconvi2
const.value: Convert to int16, pushing int32 on stack

const.name: RsCILDescrconvi4
const.value: Convert to int32, pushing int32 on stack

const.name: RsCILDescrconvi8
const.value: Convert to int64, pushing int64 on stack

const.name: RsCILDescrconvr4
const.value: Convert to float32, pushing F on stack

const.name: RsCILDescrconvr8
const.value: Convert to float64, pushing F on stack

const.name: RsCILDescrconvu4
const.value: Convert to unsigned int32, pushing int32 on stack

const.name: RsCILDescrconvu8
const.value: Convert to unsigned int64, pushing int64 on stack

const.name: RsCILDescrcallvirt
const.value: Call a method associated with obj

const.name: RsCILDescrcpobj
const.value: Copy a value type from srcValObj to destValObj

const.name: RsCILDescrldobj
const.value: Copy instance of value type classTok to the stack.

const.name: RsCILDescrldstr
const.value: push a string object for the literal string

const.name: RsCILDescrnewobj
const.value: allocate an uninitialized object or value type and call ctor

const.name: RsCILDescrisinst
const.value: test if object is an instance of class, returning NULL or an instance of that class or interface

const.name: RsCILDescrconvrun
const.value: Convert unsigned integer to floating-point, pushing F on stack

const.name: RsCILDescrunbox
const.value: Extract the value type data from obj, its boxed representation

const.name: RsCILDescrldfld
const.value: Push the value of field of object, or value type, obj, onto the stack

const.name: RsCILDescrldflda
const.value: Push the address of field of object obj on the stack

const.name: RsCILDescrstfld
const.value: Replace the value of field of the object obj with val

const.name: RsCILDescrldsfld
const.value: Push the value of field on the stack

const.name: RsCILDescrldsflda
const.value: Push the address of the static field, field, on the stack

const.name: RsCILDescrstsfld
const.value: Replace the value of field with val

const.name: RsCILDescrstobj
const.value: Store a value of type classTok from the stack into memory

const.name: RsCILDescrconvovfi1un
const.value: Convert unsigned to an int8 (on the stack as int32) and throw an exception on overflow

const.name: RsCILDescrconvovfi2un
const.value: Convert unsigned to an int16 (on the stack as int32) and throw an exception on overflow

const.name: RsCILDescrconvovfi4un
const.value: Convert unsigned to an int32 (on the stack as int32) and throw an exception on overflow

const.name: RsCILDescrconvovfi8un
const.value: Convert unsigned to an int64 (on the stack as int64) and throw an exception on overflow

const.name: RsCILDescrconvovfu1un
const.value: Convert unsigned to an unsigned int8 (on the stack as int32) and throw an exception on overflow

const.name: RsCILDescrconvovfu2un
const.value: Convert unsigned to an unsigned int16 (on the stack as int32) and throw an exception on overflow

const.name: RsCILDescrconvovfu4un
const.value: Convert unsigned to an unsigned int32 (on the stack as int32) and throw an exception on overflow

const.name: RsCILDescrconvovfu8un
const.value: Convert unsigned to an unsigned int64 (on the stack as int64) and throw an exception on overflow

const.name: RsCILDescrconvovfiun
const.value: Convert unsigned to a native int (on the stack as native int) and throw an exception on overflow

const.name: RsCILDescrconvovfuun
const.value: Convert unsigned to a native unsigned int (on the stack as native int) and throw an exception on overflow

const.name: RsCILDescrbox
const.value: Convert valueType to a true object reference

const.name: RsCILDescrnewarr
const.value: create a new array with elements of type etype

const.name: RsCILDescrldlen
const.value: push the length (of type native unsigned int) of array on the stack

const.name: RsCILDescrldelema
const.value: Load the address of element at index onto the top of the stack

const.name: RsCILDescrldelemi1
const.value: Load the element with type int8 at index onto the top of the stack as an int32

const.name: RsCILDescrldelemu1
const.value: Load the element with type unsigned int8 at index onto the top of the stack as an int32

const.name: RsCILDescrldelemi2
const.value: Load the element with type int16 at index onto the top of the stack as an int32

const.name: RsCILDescrldelemu2
const.value: Load the element with type unsigned int16 at index onto the top of the stack as an int32

const.name: RsCILDescrldelemi4
const.value: Load the element with type int32 at index onto the top of the stack as an int32

const.name: RsCILDescrldelemu4
const.value: Load the element with type unsigned int32 at index onto the top of the stack as an int32 (alias for ldelem.i4)

const.name: RsCILDescrldelemi8
const.value: Load the element with type int64 at index onto the top of the stack as an int64

const.name: RsCILDescrldelemi
const.value: Load the element with type native int at index onto the top of the stack as an native int

const.name: RsCILDescrldelemr4
const.value: Load the element with type float32 at index onto the top of the stack as an F

const.name: RsCILDescrldelemr8
const.value: Load the element with type float64 at index onto the top of the stack as an F

const.name: RsCILDescrldelemref
const.value: Load the element of type object, at index onto the top of the stack as an O

const.name: RsCILDescrstelemi
const.value: Replace array element at index with the i value on the stack

const.name: RsCILDescrstelemi1
const.value: Replace array element at index with the int8 value on the stack

const.name: RsCILDescrstelemi2
const.value: Replace array element at index with the int16 value on the stack

const.name: RsCILDescrstelemi4
const.value: Replace array element at index with the int32 value on the stack

const.name: RsCILDescrstelemi8
const.value: Replace array element at index with the int64 value on the stack

const.name: RsCILDescrstelemr4
const.value: Replace array element at index with the float32 value on the stack

const.name: RsCILDescrstelemr8
const.value: Replace array element at index with the float64 value on the stack

const.name: RsCILDescrstelemref
const.value: Replace array element at index with the ref value on the stack

const.name: RsCILDescrconvovfi1
const.value: Convert to an int8 (on the stack as int32) and throw an exception on overflow

const.name: RsCILDescrconvovfu1
const.value: Convert to a unsigned int8 (on the stack as int32) and throw an exception on overflow

const.name: RsCILDescrconvovfi2
const.value: Convert to an int16 (on the stack as int32) and throw an exception on overflow

const.name: RsCILDescrconvovfu2
const.value: Convert to a unsigned int16 (on the stack as int32) and throw an exception on overflow

const.name: RsCILDescrconvovfi4
const.value: Convert to an int32 (on the stack as int32) and throw an exception on overflow

const.name: RsCILDescrconvovfu4
const.value: Convert to a unsigned int32 (on the stack as int32) and throw an exception on overflow

const.name: RsCILDescrconvovfi8
const.value: Convert to an int64 (on the stack as int64) and throw an exception on overflow

const.name: RsCILDescrconvovfu8
const.value: Convert to a unsigned int64 (on the stack as int64) and throw an exception on overflow

const.name: RsCILDescrrefanyval
const.value: Push the address stored in a typed reference

const.name: RsCILDescrckfinite
const.value: throw ArithmeticException if value is not a finite number

const.name: RsCILDescrmkrefany
const.value: push a typed reference to ptr of type class onto the stack

const.name: RsCILDescrldtoken
const.value: Convert metadata token to its runtime representation

const.name: RsCILDescrconvu2
const.value: Convert to unsigned int16, pushing int32 on stack

const.name: RsCILDescrconvu1
const.value: Convert to unsigned int8, pushing int32 on stack

const.name: RsCILDescrconvi
const.value: Convert to native int, pushing native int on stack

const.name: RsCILDescrconvovfi
const.value: Convert to an native int (on the stack as native int) and throw an exception on overflow

const.name: RsCILDescrconvovfu
const.value: Convert to a native unsigned int (on the stack as native int) and throw an exception on overflow

const.name: RsCILDescraddovf
const.value: Add signed integer values with overflow check.

const.name: RsCILDescraddovfun
const.value: Add unsigned integer values with overflow check.

const.name: RsCILDescrmulovf
const.value: Multiply signed integer values. Signed result must fit in same size

const.name: RsCILDescrmulovfun
const.value: Multiply unsigned integer values. Unsigned result must fit in same size

const.name: RsCILDescrsubovf
const.value: Subtract native int from an native int. Signed result must fit in same size

const.name: RsCILDescrsubovfun
const.value: Subtract native unsigned int from a native unsigned int. Unsigned result must fit in same size

const.name: RsCILDescrendfinally
const.value: End finally clause of an exception block

const.name: RsCILDescrleave
const.value: Exit a protected region of code.

const.name: RsCILDescrleaves
const.value: Exit a protected region of code, short form

const.name: RsCILDescrstindi
const.value: Store value of type native int into memory at address

const.name: RsCILDescrconvu
const.value: Convert to native unsigned int, pushing native int on stack

const.name: RsCILDescrarglist
const.value: return argument list handle for the current method

const.name: RsCILDescrceq
const.value: push 1 (of type int32) if value1 equals value2, else 0

const.name: RsCILDescrcgt
const.value: push 1 (of type int32) if value1 > value2, else 0

const.name: RsCILDescrcgtun
const.value: push 1 (of type int32) if value1 > value2, unsigned or unordered, else 0

const.name: RsCILDescrclt
const.value: push 1 (of type int32) if value1 < value2, else 0

const.name: RsCILDescrcltun
const.value: push 1 (of type int32) if value1 < value2, unsigned or unordered, else 0

const.name: RsCILDescrldftn
const.value: Push a pointer to a method referenced by method on the stack

const.name: RsCILDescrldvirtftn
const.value: Push address of virtual method mthd on the stack

const.name: RsCILDescrldarg
const.value: Load argument numbered num onto stack.

const.name: RsCILDescrldarga
const.value: fetch the address of argument argNum.

const.name: RsCILDescrstarg
const.value: Store a value to the argument numbered num

const.name: RsCILDescrldloc
const.value: Load local variable of index indx onto stack.

const.name: RsCILDescrldloca
const.value: Load address of local variable with index indx

const.name: RsCILDescrstloc
const.value: Pop value from stack into local variable indx.

const.name: RsCILDescrlocalloc
const.value: Allocate space from the local memory pool.

const.name: RsCILDescrendfilter
const.value: End filter clause of SEH exception handling

const.name: RsCILDescrunaligned
const.value: Subsequent pointer instruction may be unaligned

const.name: RsCILDescrcpblk
const.value: Copy data from memory to memory

const.name: RsCILDescrinitblk
const.value: Set a block of memory to a given byte

const.name: RsCILDescrsizeof
const.value: Push the size, in bytes, of a value type as a unsigned int32

const.name: RsCILDescrrefanytype
const.value: Push the type token stored in a typed reference

const.name: RsClrCopyright
const.value: // Delphi-JEDI .NET Framework IL Disassembler. Version 0.1 // Project JEDI Code Library (JCL) Team. All rights reserved.

const.name: RsComInvalidParam
const.value: An invalid parameter was passed to the routine. If a parameter was expected, it might be an unassigned item or nil pointer

const.name: RsComFailedStreamRead
const.value: Failed to read all of the data from the specified stream

const.name: RsComFailedStreamWrite
const.value: Failed to write all of the data into the specified stream

const.name: RsComplexInvalidString
const.value: Failed to create a complex number from the string provided

const.name: RsCompressionReadNotSupported
const.value: read is not an supported operation.

const.name: RsCompressionWriteNotSupported
const.value: write is not an supported operation.

const.name: RsCompressionResetNotSupported
const.value: reset is not an supported operation.

const.name: RsCompressionSeekNotSupported
const.value: seek is not an supported operation.

const.name: RsCompressionGZIPHeaderCRC
const.value: gzip: CRC failed, header is damaged

const.name: RsCompressionGZIPDecompressing
const.value: gzip: this property is not readable when the data are being decompressed

const.name: RsCompressionGZIPNotDecompressed
const.value: gzip: this property is not readable until the data are fully decompressed

const.name: RsCompressionGZIPDataCRCFailed
const.value: gzip: CRC failed, data are damaged

const.name: RsCompressionGZIPExtraFieldTooLong
const.value: gzip: extra field is too long

const.name: RsCompressionGZIPBadString
const.value: gzip: the string contains null chars

const.name: RsCompressionBZIP2EOFError
const.value: bzip2 returned: unexpected end of file

const.name: RsCompressionBZIP2OutBuffError
const.value: bzip2 returned: out buffer is too small

const.name: RsCompressionCompressingError
const.value: Operation is not supported while compressing

const.name: RsCompressionDecompressingError
const.value: Operation is not supported while decompressing

const.name: RsCompression7zUnassignedStream
const.value: Sevenzip: Stream object is not assigned

const.name: RsCompression7zOutArchiveError
const.value: Sevenzip: Failed to get out archive interface for class %%s

const.name: RsCompression7zInArchiveError
const.value: Sevenzip: Failed to get in archive interface for class %%s

const.name: RsCompression7zUnknownValueType
const.value: Sevenzip: Unknown value type (%%d) for property ID %%d

const.name: RsCompression7zOnlyCurrentFile
const.value: Sevenzip: Only properties for current file can be retreived

const.name: RsCompressionDuplicate
const.value: The file %%s already exists in the archive

const.name: RsCompressionReplaceError
const.value: At least one compression volume could not be replaced after an archive out-of-place update

const.name: RsENoEqualityComparer
const.value: Item equality comparer is not assigned

const.name: RsMakeUTCTime
const.value: Error converting to UTC time. Time zone could not be determined

const.name: RsDateConversion
const.value: Error illegal date or time format

const.name: RsCppUnhandledExceptionMsg
const.value: Unhandled C++ exception of type '%%s' occurred

const.name: RsEUnknownCLRVersion
const.value: "%%s" is not a known CLR version

const.name: RsExprEvalFirstArg
const.value: Parse error: '(' and function's first parameter expected

const.name: RsExprEvalNextArg
const.value: Parse error: ',' and another parameter expected

const.name: RsExprEvalEndArgs
const.value: Parse error: ')' to close function's parameters expected

const.name: RsExprEvalExprNotFound
const.value: Expression compiler error: Expression '%%s' not found

const.name: RsExprEvalExprPtrNotFound
const.value: Expression compiler error: Expression pointer not found

const.name: RsFileSearchAttrInconsistency
const.value: Some file search attributes are required AND rejected!

const.name: RsEWindowsVersionNotSupported
const.value: This Windows version is not supported

const.name: RsEWindowNotValid
const.value: The window with handle %%d is not valid

const.name: RsEProcessNotValid
const.value: The process with ID %%d is not valid

const.name: RsEModuleNotValid
const.value: The module with handle %%d is not valid

const.name: RsFileStreamCreate
const.value: Unable to create temporary file stream

const.name: RsLoadFromStreamSize
const.value: Not enough space in View in procedure LoadFromStream

const.name: RsViewNeedsMapping
const.value: FileMap argument of TJclFileMappingView constructor cannot be nil

const.name: RsFailedToObtainSize
const.value: Failed to obtain size of file

const.name: RsMapiMissingExport
const.value: Function "%%s" is not exported by client

const.name: RsMapiMailNoClient
const.value: No Simple MAPI client installed, cannot send the message

const.name: RsMapiErrATTACHMENT_NOT_FOUND
const.value: A specified attachment was not found

const.name: RsEmptyArray
const.value: Empty array is not allowed as input parameter

const.name: RsNonPositiveArray
const.value: Input array contains non-positive or zero values

const.name: RsNaNTagError
const.value: NaN Tag value %%d out of range

const.name: RsLocalVarSigOutOfRange
const.value: LocalVarSig count %%d is out of range [1..$$FFFE]

const.name: RsCreateProcBuild1057Error
const.value: NT version 3.51 build 1057 or later required

const.name: RsCreateProcPrivilegeMissing
const.value: This account does not have the privilege "%%s" (%%s)

const.name: RsCreateProcPrivilegesMissing
const.value: This account does not have one (or more) of the following privileges: "%%s"(%%s) "%%s"(%%s)

const.name: RsMmTimerGetCaps
const.value: Error retrieving multimedia timer device capabilities

const.name: RsMmInconsistentId
const.value: Multimedia timer callback was called with inconsistent Id

const.name: RsMmTimerActive
const.value: This operation cannot be performed while the timer is active

const.name: RsNtfsUnableToDeleteSymbolicLink
const.value: Unable to delete temporary symbolic link

const.name: RsErrMemFuncNotSet
const.value: PCRE memory management functions not set

const.name: RsErrNoUTF8Support
const.value: No UTF-8 support in this version of PCRE

const.name: RsErrNoUTF16Support
const.value: No UTF-16 support in this version of PCRE

const.name: RsErrNoJITSupport
const.value: No JIT support in this version of PCRE

const.name: RsPeNotPE
const.value: This is not a PE format

const.name: RsPeNotAvailableForAttached
const.value: Feature is not available for attached images

const.name: RsUnableToOpenKeyRead
const.value: Unable to open key "%%s\%%s" for read

const.name: RsUnableToOpenKeyWrite
const.value: Unable to open key "%%s\%%s" for write

const.name: RsUnableToAccessValue
const.value: Unable to open key "%%s\%%s" and access value "%%s"

const.name: RsWrongDataType
const.value: "%%s\%%s\%%s" is of wrong kind or size

const.name: RsRTTISetValueOutOfRange
const.value: Set value over %%s does not fit into a 32-bit integer.

const.name: RsRTTIInvalidBaseType
const.value: Invalid base type (%%s is of type %%s).

const.name: RsRTTINoStringValue
const.value: The property %%s of type %%s has no string value

const.name: RsScheduleEndBeforeStart
const.value: End time can not be before start time

const.name: RsScheduleNoDaySpecified
const.value: At least one day of the week should be specified

const.name: RsScheduleIndexValueSup
const.value: Property IndexValue not supported for current IndexKind

const.name: RsScheduleDayNotSupported
const.value: Property Day not supported for current IndexKind

const.name: RsScheduleDayInRange
const.value: Day values should fall in the range 1 .. 31

const.name: RsScheduleMonthInRange
const.value: Month values should fall in the range 1 .. 12

const.name: RsEInvalidXMLElementUnexpectedCharacte
const.value: Invalid XML Element: Unexpected character in property declaration ("%%s" found at position %%d)

const.name: RsEInvalidXMLElementUnexpectedCharacte_
const.value: Invalid XML Element: Unexpected character in property declaration. Expecting " or ' but "%%s" found at position %%d

const.name: RsEUnexpectedValueForLPos
const.value: Unexpected value for lPos at position %%d

const.name: RsEInvalidXMLElementExpectedBeginningO
const.value: Invalid XML Element: Expected beginning of tag but "%%s" found at position %%d

const.name: RsEInvalidXMLElementExpectedEndOfTagBu
const.value: Invalid XML Element: Expected end of tag but "%%s" found at position %%d

const.name: RsEInvalidXMLElementMalformedTagFoundn
const.value: Invalid XML Element: malformed tag found (no valid name) at position %%d

const.name: RsEInvalidXMLElementErroneousEndOfTagE
const.value: Invalid XML Element: Erroneous end of tag, expecting </%%0:s> but </%%1:s> found at position %%d

const.name: RsEInvalidCommentExpectedsButFounds
const.value: Invalid Comment: expected "%%0:s" but found "%%1:s" at position %%d

const.name: RsEInvalidCommentNotAllowedInsideComme
const.value: Invalid Comment: "--" not allowed inside comments at position %%d

const.name: RsEInvalidCommentUnexpectedEndOfData
const.value: Invalid Comment: Unexpected end of data at position %%d

const.name: RsEInvalidCDATAExpectedsButFounds
const.value: Invalid CDATA: expected "%%0:s" but found "%%1:s" at position %%d

const.name: RsEInvalidCDATAUnexpectedEndOfData
const.value: Invalid CDATA: Unexpected end of data at position %%d

const.name: RsEInvalidHeaderExpectedsButFounds
const.value: Invalid Header: expected "%%0:s" but found "%%1:s" at position %%d

const.name: RsEInvalidStylesheetExpectedsButFounds
const.value: Invalid Stylesheet: expected "%%0:s" but found "%%1:s" at position %%d

const.name: RsEInvalidStylesheetUnexpectedEndOfDat
const.value: Invalid Stylesheet: Unexpected end of data at position %%d

const.name: RsEInvalidMSOExpectedsButFounds
const.value: Invalid MSO: expected "%%0:s" but found "%%1:s" at position %%d

const.name: RsEInvalidMSOUnexpectedEndOfDat
const.value: Invalid MSO: Unexpected end of data at position %%d

const.name: RsEInvalidDocumentUnexpectedTextInFile
const.value: Invalid Document: Unexpected text in file prolog at position %%d

const.name: RsStreamsCRCError
const.value: Cyclic Redundency Check (CRC) error: data are damaged

const.name: RsStringHashMapMustBeEmpty
const.value: HashList: must be empty to set size to zero

const.name: RsInvalidEmptyStringItem
const.value: String list passed to StringsToMultiSz cannot contain empty strings.

const.name: RsNumericConstantTooLarge
const.value: Numeric constant too large (%%d) at position %%d.

const.name: RsDotNetFormatArgumentNotSupported
const.value: Argument type of %%d is not supported

const.name: RsDotNetFormatObjectArgumentNotSupported
const.value: Argument type (%%s) of %%d is not supported

const.name: RsTabs_DuplicatesNotAllowed
const.value: Duplicate tab stops are not allowed.

const.name: RsTabs_StopExpected
const.value: A tab stop was expected but not found.

const.name: RsArg_NullReferenceException
const.value: Object reference not set to an instance of an object.

const.name: RsMetSectInvalidParameter
const.value: An invalid parameter was passed to the constructor.

const.name: RsMetSectInitialize
const.value: Failed to initialize the metered section.

const.name: RsMetSectNameEmpty
const.value: Name cannot be empty when using the Open constructor.

const.name: RsIntelCacheDescr02
const.value: Instruction TLB: 4 MByte pages, 4-way set associative, 2 entries

const.name: RsIntelCacheDescr03
const.value: Data TLB: 4 KByte pages, 4-way set associative, 64 entries

const.name: RsIntelCacheDescr04
const.value: Data TLB: 4 MByte pages, 4-way set associative, 8 entries

const.name: RsIntelCacheDescr05
const.value: Data TLB1: 4 MByte pages, 4-way set associative, 32 entries

const.name: RsIntelCacheDescr06
const.value: 1st level instruction cache: 8 KBytes, 4-way set associative, 32 byte line size

const.name: RsIntelCacheDescr08
const.value: 1st level instruction cache: 16 KBytes, 4-way set associative, 32 byte line size

const.name: RsIntelCacheDescr09
const.value: 1st level instruction cache: 32 KBytes, 4-way set associative, 64 byte line size

const.name: RsIntelCacheDescr0A
const.value: 1st level data cache: 8 KBytes, 2-way set associative, 32 byte line size

const.name: RsIntelCacheDescr0B
const.value: Instruction TLB: 4 MByte pages, 4-way set associative, 4 entries

const.name: RsIntelCacheDescr0C
const.value: 1st level data cache: 16 KBytes, 4-way set associative, 32 byte line size

const.name: RsIntelCacheDescr0D
const.value: 1st level data cache: 16 KBytes, 4-way set associative, 64 byte line size

const.name: RsIntelCacheDescr0E
const.value: 1st level data cache: 24 KBytes, 6-way set associative, 64 byte line size

const.name: RsIntelCacheDescr22
const.value: 3rd level cache: 512 KBytes, 4-way set associative, 64 byte line size, 2 lines per sector

const.name: RsIntelCacheDescr23
const.value: 3rd level cache: 1 MBytes, 8-way set associative, 64 byte line size, 2 lines per sector

const.name: RsIntelCacheDescr25
const.value: 3rd level cache: 2 MBytes, 8-way set associative, 64 byte line size, 2 lines per sector

const.name: RsIntelCacheDescr29
const.value: 3rd level cache: 4 MBytes, 8-way set associative, 64 byte line size, 2 lines per sector

const.name: RsIntelCacheDescr2C
const.value: 1st level data cache: 32 KBytes, 8-way set associative, 64 byte line size

const.name: RsIntelCacheDescr30
const.value: 1st level instruction cache: 32 KBytes, 8-way set associative, 64 byte line size

const.value: 2nd-level cache: 512 KBytes, 4-way set associative, sectored cache, 64-byte line size

const.value: No 2nd-level cache or, if processor contains a valid 2nd-level cache, no 3rd-level cache

const.name: RsIntelCacheDescrFF
const.value: CPUID leaf 2 does not report cache descriptor information, use CPUID leaf 4 to query cache parameters

const.name: RsCannotWriteRefStream
const.value: Can not write to a read-only memory stream

const.name: RsStringToBoolean
const.value: Unable to convert the string "%%s" to a boolean

const.name: RsInvalidDigitValue
const.value: There is no valid base %%d digit for decimal value %%d

const.name: RsInvalidGUIDString
const.value: Invalid conversion from string to GUID (%%s).

const.name: RsInvalidMMFEmpty
const.value: The MMF named "%%s" cannot be created empty

const.name: RsHasNotTD32Info
const.value: File [%%s] has not TD32 debug information!

const.name: RsEDaylightSavingsNotSupported
const.value: Daylight Savings not supported by this timezone

const.name: RsEAutoAdjustNotEnabled
const.value: Auto adjust for Daylight Savings is not enabled. Date is not available

const.name: RsURECharacterClassOpen
const.value: Character class not closed, ']' is missing.

const.name: RsURERepeatRangeOpen
const.value: Repetition range not closed, '}' is missing.

const.name: RsCombiningClassUnicodeChar
const.value: combining class for Unicode character > $FFFFFF found

const.name: RsTempConvTypeError
const.value: An invalid type has been provided for the %%s parameter

const.name: RsConvTempBelowAbsoluteZero
const.value: Temperature can not be below Absolute Zero!
